name: code-review
description: Evaluations for code-review skill trigger accuracy and output quality

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user explicitly mentions code-review

prompts.input: Review the latest commit using code-review
I want to review PR #123 with code-review
prompts.reason: PR review with explicit skill name

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for general review or code reading requests

prompts.input: Can you read my code and explain it
Fix this bug in my code

evals.name: output-quality-review-report
evals.description: Verify review output contains expected sections
evals.prompt: Run code-review on the latest commit

checks.name: has-issues-section
checks.description: Output should contain issues or findings

checks.name: has-confidence-score
checks.description: Output should include confidence scores for findings
